/CAL:RULING REQUES FOR  PAROLEE TO BE REMANDED NUNC PRO TUNC/X:PAROLE AGENT ROBERT ABAKAN AND CONFLICT ATTORNEY ARE APPEARING VIA ZOOM/3000ADV/3000ADM/X:ADMITS VIOLATION OF #3 & #4/3000REIN/X:WITHOUT TIME LOST/PAJ:136 DAYS/X:PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR 136 DAYS,/4019HALF/X:PAROLE REINSTATED TO: 03-24-22/X:PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLE UPON RELEASE AND FOLLOW INSTRUCTIONS GIVEN BY THE PAROLE AGENT,/X:PEOPLE WITHDRAW AND DISMISS REMAINDER OF ALLEGATIONS - GRANTED/X:ALL REMAINDER OF TERMS AND CONDITIONSREMAIN THE SAME/X:PAROLEE UNDERSTANDS THAT SHE WILL NOT BE RELEASED TODAYBUT INSTEAD IS GOING DIRECTLY TO A RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM/X:PAROLEE'S RESPONSIBILITY TO CALL PAROLE AND INFORM THEM/

/CAL: PRC REFERRAL/X: PAROLE AGENT JUSTIN LUGAR APPEARING,/OR/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BYTHE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE, AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORINGDEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALLINSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/CTORD: DEFENDANT MUST SUBMIT TO A DRUG TEST WHEN DIRECTED TO DO SO BY A SFSO SWORN EMPLOYEE/CTORD: DEFENDANT MUST NOT CONSUME ANY ALCOHOL OR MARIJUANA/CTORD: DEFENDANT MUST ATTEND COUNSELING-GROUPS AS DIRECTED/CONTD: PRC ELIGIBILITY REPORT/DOP/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/
